metadata.title: SMAESI — AI-Powered Agency for Modern Moroccan Businesses
metadata.description: Blazing-fast websites, custom e-commerce, and WhatsApp AI bots in days — enterprise-grade tools at local prices.

hero.sub: We build blazing-fast websites, custom e-commerce platforms, and WhatsApp AI bots in days, not months. Get enterprise-grade digital tools at local prices.
hero.stat2Label: Less dev time — savings for you

whyUs.headlinePrefix: Why pay for a traditional agency when you can have the
whyUs.body: Moroccan businesses need to move fast. Traditional agencies take months and overcharge. Because our team is powered by the latest AI development tools, we deliver better results, 3x faster, at a fraction of the cost.

bullets.title: Blazing Fast Speeds
bullets.body: We build on modern infrastructure (Next.js) so your site loads in milliseconds, even on a 3G mobile network. No more lost customers.

bullets.title: Built-in Intelligence
bullets.body: We don't just build websites; we give you digital employees. Our WhatsApp bots answer clients and qualify leads 24/7.

bullets.title: Higher ROI, Lower Costs
bullets.body: Our AI-accelerated workflow cuts our development time by 70%. We pass those savings directly to you.

services.title: Transparent Pricing. Scalable Solutions.
services.subtitle: Choose a specialized service, or grab one of our bundled packs to launch immediately.

blocks.intro: Stop wasting time on repetitive tasks. Hire a "digital employee" that works 24/7 for the price of an intern.

items.title: WhatsApp / IG AI Bot (5,000 – 12,000 MAD)
items.desc: An intelligent bot that speaks Darija/French, answers FAQs, and qualifies leads directly on WhatsApp.

items.title: Custom Internal CRM (20,000 – 60,000 MAD)
items.desc: Ditch the messy Excel sheets. We build a fast, custom dashboard to track your inventory, leads, and sales automatically.

items.title: Bot Hosting & Maintenance (From 1,500 MAD/month)
items.desc: Continuous updates and monitoring to ensure your AI is always learning and accurate.

blocks.intro: Tired of slow WordPress sites? We build ultra-modern web products designed to rank high on Google and convert visitors into buyers.

items.title: Express Vitrine Site (3,500 – 9,000 MAD)
items.desc: A beautiful, high-converting 3-to-5 page website delivered in just days.

items.title: Full Business Website + SEO (10,000 – 25,000 MAD)
items.desc: Optimized for Google, complete with a blog and lead-capture forms.

items.title: E-Commerce Platform (15,000 – 40,000 MAD)
items.desc: Sell locally or globally with seamless integration for Moroccan payment gateways (CMI, Cash Plus) or Cash on Delivery (COD) tracking.

items.title: Custom Mobile App / PWA (35,000+ MAD)
items.desc: Apps your clients can install directly on their phones without the hassle of the App Store.

blocks.intro: We don't just get you clicks; we get leads sent directly to your phone.

items.title: Branding Package (4,000 – 12,000 MAD)
items.desc: Modern logos, color palettes, and social media templates designed with the latest AI visual tools.

items.title: AI Marketing Starter (4,000 – 10,000 MAD)
items.desc: Professional setup of your Meta/Google ads and pixel tracking.

items.title: Monthly Growth Retainer (From 4,000 MAD/month)
items.desc: We manage your ads, optimize campaigns using AI insights, and send leads straight to your WhatsApp. (Ad spend paid directly to Meta/Google).

bundles.title: The "No-Brainer" Bundles
bundles.subtitle: Our most popular packages for Moroccan businesses looking for a complete digital transformation.

items.title: The "Digital Starter Pack"
items.perfect: Perfect for real estate, consultants, and local services.

items.title: The "Zero-Admin" E-Commerce Pack
items.perfect: Perfect for local retail, agritech, and D2C brands.
points: WhatsApp Bot for automatic order tracking & customer support

footer.tagline: Enterprise-grade digital tools — websites, e-commerce, and WhatsApp AI — delivered fast.
